timer.no_minutes: Please specify at least 1 for `minutes` or `seconds`.

clear.fail: Failed to delete. Only messages within 14 days can be deleted.

untimeout.not_timeout: This user is not timed out.

role.already_has: The target user already has this role.
role.not_has: The target user does not have this role.
